why.title: Why Panama
why.subtitle: Panama combines dollar stability, strategic location, and strong real estate appreciation for international investors.
why.card1_text: Panama uses the US dollar, eliminating currency risk and offering predictable financial stability for investors.
why.card2_text: Real estate in coastal areas continues to grow with high demand from international buyers and expats.
why.card3_text: Tropical climate, beaches, golf resorts and luxury communities define Panama's lifestyle appeal.
why.label: Safe Investment

lifestyle.label: Lifestyle
lifestyle.title:
Coastal Living,
Redefined in Panama
lifestyle.text1: Experience beachfront living on Panama's Pacific coast, where tropical nature, privacy, and modern architecture blend into a refined coastal lifestyle.
lifestyle.text2: Designed for international buyers seeking both investment value and a slower, higher-quality way of life.
lifestyle.h1_text: Direct access to pristine beaches and coastal nature reserves.
lifestyle.h2_text: Secure gated environments with luxury infrastructure.
lifestyle.h3_text: Strong appreciation driven by international demand.

property.nearby_subtitle: The property is ideally located in Coronado, surrounded by essential services, leisure options, and natural coastal attractions.
